allow: Bash(python3 -c "import ast; import glob; errors=[]; [errors.append\(f\) for f in glob.glob\('**/*.py', recursive=True\) if not \(lambda p: \(ast.parse\(open\(p\).read\(\)\), True\)[-1] if open\(p\).read\(\).strip\(\) else True\)\(f\)]; print\('All Python files parse OK' if not errors else f'Errors in: {errors}'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('dependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('---devDependencies---'\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('devDependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\)")
